title: Team Death Link
description: Plugin that links player deaths across teams. If one member dies, the other team members in their team die.
body:
Death Link links players on the same team(s) deaths. When one player dies, the other players on their team will die.
![Respawn Screen caused by Teammate Dying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68d589a8a6ef0f8e1b5c256c202f14a13ba9e142.png)
